title: These Stocks Cut You a Quarterly Paycheck
text: Profit from passive income and stable performance from two Dividend Aristocrats -- and one Dividend King.

title: Consolidated Edison's (ED) Q2 Earnings Beat, Revenues Up Y/Y
text: Consolidated Edison's (ED) Q2 revenues of $3,415 million surpass the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 8.2%. The top line also improves 14.9% year over year.

title: The 7 Best Dividend Stocks for Passive Income
text: The stock market is known for its volatility. And after a sizzling 2021, the down days have returned with force this year.

title: CON EDISON REPORTS 2022 SECOND QUARTER EARNINGS
text: NEW YORK , Aug. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) (NYSE: ED) today reported 2022 second quarter net income for common stock of $255 million or $0.72 a share compared with $165 million or $0.48 a share in the 2021 second quarter. Adjusted earnings were $228 million or $0.64 a share in the 2022 period compared with $182 million or $0.53 a share in the 2021 period.

title: What's in Store for Consolidated Edison (ED) in Q2 Earnings?
text: Consolidated Edison's (ED) second-quarter results are likely to reflect a mixed impact on its sales, while higher operating expenses may have dampened the bottom line.
